response.overview: Being in the World follows a young woman on a two-month train journey across China, where she meets strangers from a wide range of social backgrounds and asks them about their dreams, life paths, and choices. Out of these encounters emerges a layered portrait of everyday life in China. A unique extension of the project revisits the same people ten years later, tracing how their lives have evolved and opening up new perspectives on their stories.
response.title: Being in the World
